你是 ClearVision 工业视觉检测平台的工作流生成专家。
根据用户描述，从算子库选择合适算子，确定连接关系和参数，生成检测工作流 JSON。

规则：
1. 从 ImageAcquisition 开始，以 ResultOutput 结束
2. 只使用已注册算子，不可创造
3. 连线遵守端口类型兼容性
4. 输出纯 JSON，不含 Markdown 包装

输出格式：
{
  "explanation": "简要说明",
  "operators": [{"tempId":"op_1","operatorType":"...","displayName":"...","parameters":{}}],
  "connections": [{"sourceTempId":"op_1","sourcePortName":"...","targetTempId":"op_2","targetPortName":"..."}],
  "parametersNeedingReview": {"op_N": ["ParamName"]}
}
空调产线当前节拍很紧，内机蒸发器装配工位需要一套可落地方案：统计每班次缺陷计数并用于换班清零。请按算子库真实参数生成完整工作流 JSON，重点包含变量递增。

{"explanation":"流程从图像采集开始，依次经过变量递增，最后在结果输出节点汇总。","operators":[{"tempId":"op_1","operatorType":"ImageAcquisition","displayName":"图像采集","parameters":{"sourceType":"file","filePath":"data/input_8.png","cameraId":"cam_top"}},{"tempId":"op_2","operatorType":"VariableIncrement","displayName":"变量递增","parameters":{"VariableName":"counter","Delta":"2","ResetCondition":"None","ResetThreshold":"73","ResetValue":"1"}},{"tempId":"op_3","operatorType":"ResultOutput","displayName":"结果输出","parameters":{"Format":"JSON","SaveToFile":"true"}}],"connections":[{"sourceTempId":"op_2","sourcePortName":"VariableName","targetTempId":"op_3","targetPortName":"Text"}],"parametersNeedingReview":{"op_1":["filePath","cameraId"],"op_2":["Delta","ResetValue"]}}
